name: odoo-social-marketing
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo Social Marketing including social account management, multi-platform publishing, AI-powered social posting pipeline, and activity review workflow for Odoo 19.

patterns.pipeline_flow: Cron → Server Action → discover companies → read brand notes → detect industry → web search → create draft → create activity → email notification → Admin approves → automation triggers → post scheduled → hourly cron publishes
patterns.dedup_method: Query last 5 posts per company, pass avoided topics as web search context
patterns.industry_detection: Keyword matching against company name + partner notes (sport / tech / default)
patterns.brand_voice: Stored in res.partner.comment as HTML — read dynamically by server action
